subcodes.first_line: O Mirza! Hearken unto the Call of God, the Lord of Names, which hath been raised from the direction of the Prison as a token of His grace unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا میرزا اسمع ندآء الله مالک الاسمآء الذی ارتفع من شطر السجن فضلا من عنده علیک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
